summary: Iteration 155: PMS Decomposition Stage 3 - All tests passed. 59 route wiring tests + 39 Stage 3 regression tests + 18 load tests verified. All remaining routes extracted from pms.py into dedicated modules (pms_availability.py, pms_reservations.py, pms_room_details.py, pms_room_queue.py, pms_services.py). ObjectId serialization fixes verified for allotment-contracts and group-reservations.
critical_code_review_comments: Stage 3 decomposition successfully extracted all remaining routes from pms.py (now 21 lines, just backward-compat import)
New modules created: pms_availability.py (267 lines), pms_reservations.py (579 lines), pms_room_details.py (213 lines), pms_room_queue.py (212 lines), pms_services.py (283 lines)
Router registry correctly includes all new routers (pms_services, pms_room_queue, pms_room_details, pms_reservations, pms_availability)
All 59 PMS routes are wired and return non-404 status codes
ObjectId serialization bugs fixed: POST /api/pms/allotment-contracts and POST /api/pms/group-reservations no longer leak _id field
Load tests verify concurrent operations work correctly: availability reads, booking creation, room blocks, staff tasks, dashboard
No behavior changes detected - all routes work identically to before decomposition

success_rate.backend: 100% - 116/116 tests passed (59 route wiring + 39 Stage 3 regression + 18 load tests)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 155 verified PMS decomposition Stage 3. Key tests: (1) 59 PMS route wiring regression test - all routes return non-404, (2) 39 Stage 3 functional tests covering all extracted modules, (3) 18 load/chaos tests verifying concurrent operations. ObjectId serialization fixes verified for allotment-contracts and group-reservations create endpoints. pms.py is now just 21 lines (backward-compat import only). All routes extracted to dedicated modules.
